user.title: Add Ollama Account
user.description: Enter your ollama.com account details. To get the cookie: log in to ollama.com → DevTools → Network tab → reload → click the first request → copy the full Cookie header value.

data_description.account_name: A friendly name for this account (e.g. Main, Work)
data_description.cookie: The full Cookie header value from your browser
data_description.scan_interval: How often to fetch usage data (60–3600 seconds)

reconfigure.title: Update Ollama Cookie
reconfigure.description: Paste a fresh cookie string to restore access. Your account name will stay the same.

data_description.cookie: The full Cookie header value from your browser
data_description.scan_interval: How often to fetch usage data (60–3600 seconds)

error.invalid_cookie: Cookie is invalid or expired — please paste a fresh one
error.parse_error: Connected but could not parse usage data — page structure may have changed
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to ollama.com — check your network
